goal: B1 安全修复: Issue #22 API Key localStorage 加密存储 + 传输安全基础加固

coverage_checklist.crypto_util_exists: assert: src/shared/crypto.ts 提供 encrypt/decrypt 方法
coverage_checklist.settings_encrypted: assert: useSettings.ts 使用 crypto 加密 API Key 后存入 localStorage
coverage_checklist.backward_compatible: assert: 读取旧明文数据时自动迁移到加密格式
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.test_pass: assert: bun run test 通过
